name: Coffee Negroni
method:
Coffee infused Gin
300mL Old Tom Gin, 13g Coffee Beans
Cold infuse 24 hours

Citrus infused Aperitivo
150mL Campari, 100mL Amaro Montenegro
Citrus peel at 10% weight of aperitivo mix. Blanch peels twice to reduce bitterness
Sous Vide @55°C for 1 hour

name: Deconstructed Banana Colada

ingredients.ingredient: Fig Leaf infused Rum with Banana Oleo

method:
Fig Leaf Infused Rum
300mL Light Rum, 4 fig leaves, pinch of citric Acid
Room Temperature Infuse for 18-24 hours

Banana Oleo
3 banana skins, 50g sugar, pinch of citric acid
Room temperature macerate for 18-24 hours

Combine Fig Leaf Infused Rum, Banana Oleo, Cinnamon, Nutmeg, Room Temperature Infuse for 1 hour
Filter with Coffee Filter

Banana Juice Cordial
3 Bananas, Pinch of Citric Acid
Blend and clarify with Pectinex
Citric Acid @3% by weight

Coconut Cloud Float
2:1 Coconut Milk : Thick Cream
Pinch of Salt
Vanilla Extract

name: Fruitcake Manhattan
method:
Candied Fruit Infused Manhattan
300mL Brandy
100mL Sweet Vermouth
50mL clear unsweetened Apple Juice
150g Candied/Glace fruit (including glace citrus peel and cherries)
Cinnamon, Nutmeg, All Spice
Vanilla Extract

Sous Vide @55°C 1 hour
Clarify with Pectinex

Cake infused Vermouth
50mL milk
20g Cake (plain short cake or fruit cake)
Blend, strain solids
3:1 ratio milk wash with Dry Vermouth and the cake-infused milk

name: Honeymoon Period
method:
Lychee Passionfruit cordial
200mL Lychee juice, 50mL passionfruit juice (4:1 ratio)
Sugar @27.5% weight
Citric Acid @2% weight

Jasmine Milk Tea
4g Jasmine Tea with 200mL Milk (20g team/ 1000mL milk)
Bring to boil, then turn off heat and soak for 5min

Milk Wash
3:1 cocktail to milk Milk Wash

1mL Orange Blossom Water / 100mL resultant milk wash
spritz with orange blossom water as garnish

name: Passionate Lychee Martini
method:
Jasmine Tea Infused Vodka
500 mL Vodka
10 g Jasmine Tea
cold infuse 24 hours

large variance sourness of yuzu sake and passionfruit
lemon juice 🍋 optional to adjust balance (0-5mL)

name: Mezcal Paloma
ingredients: top up with Soda, about 1:1 ratio of cocktail:soda
method:
Citrus and Rosmary shrub
3:2:2 ratio of citrus to sugar to white wine vinegar
(prefer Ruby Grapefruit for colour and flavour)
Rosemary

Day 1: Oleo/macerate sugar, citrus peel and rosemary for 1 day
Day 2: add the other ingredients
Infuse for 3-5 more days
notes: Concept originally from 'Bar Flying Bumblebee', Tokyo

name: Tonka Truck
method:
Tonka Bean and Vanilla Syrup
100 mL Water
100 g Sugar
2 Tonka Beans, grated
10mL Vanilla Extract
Combine above ingredients with heat. Don't boil/burn
Infuse 1 hour

name: Silk Jasmine
method:
Pineapple Rum
300mL Dark Rum (ideally Planteray Pineapple Rum)
Sous Vide @55°C for 2 hours

Passionfruit Cordial
175g Passionfruit Juice without seeds
52.5g Sugar (~30% by weight)
5g citric acid (~2.5% by weight)

Jasmine Milk Tea
4g Jasmine Tea with 200mL Milk (20g team/ 1000mL milk)
Bring to boil, then turn off heat and soak for 5min

Milk Wash
Infuse chinese 5 spice powder for > 12 hours
3:1 cocktail to milk Milk Wash
notes: Concept originally from 'Kahii', Sydney - 'Silk Jasmine' cocktail
